Sim Notes

column2: Your next physical attack deals 12(1.0) evil magical damage to the target and reduces their incoming physical and magical healing by 80% for 12 seconds

Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional 30 max health, 50 armor rating, and 50 magic resistance. Your entire body is covered in Abyssal Flame, you take 1% damage per second, and deal 2(0.25) magical damage per second to nearby characters. Once activated the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, you consume existing Darkness Shards when you activate, gaining +1 to all attributes and 33% dark magical damage bonus per shard consumed, and these buffs last the whole time you are in demon form. When you become a demon, your skills change to demon-only skills: (1) Exploitation Strike — bare-hand attack dealing an additional 20(1.0) evil magical damage for 2 seconds, healing the caster for 10% of the target's maximum health. (2) Exit Demon Form — return to human form, no stat changes. Additionally, while in demon form, Bolt of Darkness becomes castable bare-handed regardless of whether it is equipped in a spell memory.
column4: Demon form skill replacements: Exploitation Strike (one slot) and Exit Demon Form (other slot). Bolt of Darkness gains accessibility via grantsSpells (or grantsSpellAccess) — castable without needing spell memory selection. Darkness Shard interaction: model as locked-in stacking on Blood Pact (per-shard +1 all attributes + 33% dark magical damage bonus, max 3 shards consumed at activation). Self-damage 1% max HP/second is display-only.
